narrative:
Noussair Mazraoui is a Right-Back representing the Kingdom of the Netherlands. His overall rating of 7.41/10 places him among the top 1% of right-backs at this tournament. This high rating reflects strong form, with 75% derived from his club performances over the last two seasons.

Mazraoui demonstrates strong defensive engagement, averaging 2.955 tackles per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He also contributes significantly to clearing danger, with 6.818 clearances per 90 minutes. However, his attacking output is limited, registering only 0.019 expected assists per 90 minutes in the tournament. His 0.227 interceptions per 90 minutes suggest a more reactive defensive style.

Mazraoui serves as a defensively reliable Right-Back for the Kingdom of the Netherlands, anchoring his flank. Scouts should continue to monitor his consistent defensive work rate in upcoming matches. It will be important to observe if his attacking contributions, particularly his expected assists, increase as the tournament progresses.
